result:
Story #3 delivered and landed.

## `/deliver 3 --yes` — complete

Discovered the ticket (v2 is Story-only — no separate Epic issue), resolved the graph (single ready Story, no unmet dependencies), and delivered it through the one deliver-story engine.

**Status: `landed`** — PR **#4** merged to `main`, Story **#3** flipped to `agent::done`.

| Gate | Result |
|---|---|
| Validation (`npm test`) | ✅ 17/17 green (incl. new /password tests) |
| Lint / typecheck | ✅ both pass |
| Base sync | ✅ |
| Acceptance self-eval | ✅ 8/8 AC met (`proceed`) |
| Close-scope code review | ✅ 0 findings |

**What landed** (commit `5d749e5`):
- **`src/db.js`** — `changePassword(userId, newPassword)`: fresh salt+scrypt, then an atomic `BEGIN → UPDATE users … → DELETE FROM sessions WHERE user_id=? → COMMIT` (rollback on error). This is what makes the change behave as expected — the old hash is replaced *and* every prior session row is dropped in one unit.
- **`src/app.js`** — `POST /password` registered in `routes`, `/password` added to `knownPaths` (wrong method → 405), handler mirroring `createNote`'s order: 401 `unauthorized` → 400 `bad_request` (malformed/oversized) → 400 `missing_fields` (blank) → 200 `{ ok: true }`. No secret echoed.
- **`test/api.test.js`** — 7 integration tests covering AC-1…AC-8: pre-change tokens 401 afterward, new password logs in, old password rejected, unauth guards cause no mutation, bad bodies → 400, non-POST → 405.
- **`README.md`** — unchanged (no endpoint list exists to extend, matching the Spec's condition).

**Tail note (non-demoting):** local `story-3` branch/worktree ref cleanup and base fast-forward were skipped — the worktree is still checked out and `main`'s tree has pre-existing untracked `temp/` content. The merge itself stands; the next `git-cleanup` sweep reaps the local ref.

The single-Story run skips the per-run epilogue by design (follow-ups were captured on merge). Nothing is left blocked or pending.
